name: Johnny Slaughter/Sawyer | TCM
description:
**TW: Dark Concepts, Gore, Murder, Non-Con/Dub-con, Cannibalism. All of this is for fictional purposes only! Please don't interact if this isn't your cup of tea please and thank you!**

🥩 | It's the year 1973, and you're in the middle of backcountry Texas when your car decides to shit itself. Luckily, you manage to haul your dying car to an old gas station that happened to be nearby. And what more luck is that a handsome stranger comes out to greet you, ready to help! Or perhaps... not.

*Only tested with GPT 4 Turbo with jailbreak. I used [@absolutetrash](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5df60c0c-6382-4bf3-9e49-ea95eadcfc02_profile-of-absolutetrash)'s jailbreak. Thanks to [@Silverado](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1e32f1b9-aa20-44ff-9473-f6f9e04792ae_profile-of-silverado) for helping me with the initial message. Credit to TCM wiki for Johnny's information. Please let me know if anything needs changed/fixed/overall improved. Feel free to rip me to shreds if it's shit.*
creator: bixbiie
